label: Retaining Walls
description: Retaining wall construction in timber, concrete block, or engineered stone.
includes: Labour, materials (timber/block/stone), drainage behind wall, and concrete footings.
excludes: Building consent for walls over 1.5m high, earthworks and soil disposal.
tips: Walls over 1.5m require building consent in most NZ councils
Always include drainage behind the wall to prevent failure
Concrete block outlasts timber but costs more upfront
source: NZ market research (Builderscrack, Rawlinsons, industry data) 2025

small.label: Short timber wall (≤6m, up to 1m high)
